payload.description: Operates seven bridges and two tunnels in New York City, handling over 330 million vehicle crossings every year in addition to managing the Congestion Relief Zone.

payload.description: Winter Storm Fern brought sustained snowfall followed by prolonged below-freezing temperatures. For 23 continuous hours, MTA Bridges and Tunnels employees plowed 11,000 lane miles and applied 2,800 tons of deicer.
